wn.def: act so as to bring into existence

existing.en: a change that happens because of something else

ex.en: The medicine had a strong effect on her headache.
ex.ko: 그 약은 그녀의 두통에 강한 효과가 있었다.

wn.def: the state of being employed or having a job

existing.en: pay someone to work for you

ex.en: The factory employs over 200 workers.
ex.ko: 그 공장은 200명이 넘는 근로자를 고용하고 있다.

existing.en: use a particular method, skill, or object for a purpose

ex.en: The artist employed bold colors in her work.
ex.ko: 그 화가는 자신의 작품에 대담한 색을 활용했다.

existing.en: as much as is needed

ex.en: We don't have enough time.

existing.en: to the necessary degree

ex.en: Is the soup hot enough for you?

wn.def: put to the test, as for its quality, or give experimental use to

existing.en: a short piece of writing about a particular subject

ex.en: She wrote an essay about climate change.
ex.ko: 그녀는 기후 변화에 관한 에세이를 썼다.

existing.en: completely necessary

ex.en: Sleep is essential for good health.

existing.en: facts or information that show something is true

ex.en: The police found no evidence of a crime.

wn.def: more than is needed, desired, or required

existing.en: an amount that is more than what is needed or allowed

ex.en: He was charged extra for excess baggage.
ex.ko: 그는 초과 수하물 때문에 추가 요금을 냈다.

wn.def: an object or statement produced before a court of law and referred to while giving evidence

existing.en: show something in a public place for people to see

ex.en: The museum exhibits ancient artifacts from Egypt.
ex.ko: 그 박물관은 이집트 고대 유물을 전시한다.

existing.en: show a particular quality, feeling, or ability

ex.en: The patient exhibited signs of improvement.

existing.cue: 조국에서 쫓겨나 다른 나라에 사는 상태
existing.en: the state of being forced to live away from one's own country, often for political reasons

ex.en: The former president died in exile.
ex.ko: 그 전직 대통령은 망명 생활 중 사망했다.

existing.en: a person who lives away from their home country, often unable to return

ex.en: Many exiles returned home after the war ended.
ex.ko: 전쟁이 끝난 후 많은 망명자들이 고국으로 돌아갔다.

existing.en: treat someone unfairly by using their work or situation to your own advantage

ex.en: The company was accused of exploiting its workers.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 노동자들을 착취했다는 비난을 받았다.

existing.en: use something fully in order to gain an advantage from it

ex.en: The country hopes to exploit its natural resources.

existing.en: show your thoughts or feelings through words or actions

ex.en: She expressed her thanks to the whole team.

existing.cue: 정거장을 거의 서지 않는 빠른 교통편
existing.en: traveling quickly and stopping at few or no stations

ex.en: We took the express train to save time.

wn.def: the furthest or highest degree of something
the point located farthest from the middle of something

existing.en: very great in degree; far beyond what is normal

ex.en: They faced extreme weather conditions on the trip.
ex.ko: 그들은 그 여행에서 극도의 기상 상황을 겪었다.

existing.en: the body part used for seeing

ex.en: She has beautiful blue eyes.
ex.ko: 그녀는 아름다운 파란 눈을 가지고 있다.

existing.en: involving direct personal contact rather than phone or online

ex.en: We prefer face-to-face meetings over video calls.
ex.ko: 우리는 화상 통화보다 대면 회의를 선호한다.

wn.def: consider as relevant when making a decision

existing.en: something that influences or contributes to a result

ex.en: Diet is an important factor in staying healthy.
ex.ko: 식단은 건강을 유지하는 데 중요한 요인이다.

existing.en: a number that divides exactly into another number

ex.en: 2 and 3 are factors of 6.

wn.def: join so that the external surfaces blend smoothly

existing.en: treating everyone equally and reasonably

ex.en: The teacher was fair to all the students.

existing.en: an event where people buy and sell things or where rides and games are set up

ex.en: We went to the county fair last weekend.
ex.ko: 우리는 지난 주말에 지역 축제에 갔다.

existing.en: (of hair or skin) light in color

ex.en: She has fair skin and blonde hair.
ex.ko: 그녀는 흰 피부와 금발 머리를 가지고 있다.

existing.en: (of weather) fine and not raining

ex.en: The forecast promises fair weather this weekend.
ex.ko: 일기예보에서 이번 주말은 맑은 날씨라고 한다.

wn.def: a group of people who adhere to a common faith and habitually attend a given church

existing.en: loyal and never letting someone down

ex.en: He remained faithful to his wife.

wn.def: a person who makes deceitful pretenses
(football) a deceptive move made by a football player

existing.en: not genuine; made to look like the real thing

ex.en: She was carrying a fake designer bag.
ex.ko: 그녀는 가짜 명품 가방을 들고 있었다.

existing.en: pretend to have a feeling, illness, or quality that you do not really have

ex.en: He faked an injury to avoid playing.
ex.ko: 그는 경기에 나가지 않으려고 부상을 꾸며냈다.

wn.def: blow away or off with a current of air

existing.en: someone who likes and admires a person, team, or activity very much

ex.en: He is a huge fan of that soccer team.

existing.en: a machine with blades that turns to create a current of air

ex.en: Turn on the fan, it's too hot in here.
ex.ko: 선풍기 좀 켜, 여기 너무 더워.

existing.en: the money you pay to travel on a bus, train, or taxi

ex.en: The bus fare went up this year.

wn.def: more distant in especially space or time

existing.en: at or to a greater distance (comparative of far)

ex.en: We need to walk a bit farther to reach the lake.
ex.ko: 호수에 도착하려면 조금 더 멀리 걸어야 한다.

wn.def: make out of components (often in an improvising manner)

existing.en: the popular style of clothes or behavior at a certain time

ex.en: She works in the fashion industry.

existing.en: moving or able to move quickly

ex.en: He drives a very fast car.

existing.en: quickly

ex.en: She ran fast to catch the bus.

existing.en: eat no food for a period of time

ex.en: Some people fast during religious holidays.
ex.ko: 어떤 사람들은 종교 명절 동안 금식한다.

existing.en: a male parent

ex.en: My father works at a hospital.

wn.def: put or pin the blame on

existing.en: the responsibility for something bad that happened

ex.en: It's not your fault that the train was late.
ex.ko: 기차가 늦은 건 네 잘못이 아니야.

existing.en: a problem or weakness in something

ex.en: The mechanic found a fault in the engine.

wn.def: partake in a feast or banquet
provide a feast or banquet for

existing.cue: 많은 사람이 모여 먹는 큰 식사
existing.en: a large meal, usually to celebrate something special

ex.en: The wedding feast lasted late into the night.

wn.def: join tongue and groove, in carpentry

existing.en: one of the light, soft things that cover a bird's body

ex.en: A bright feather fell from the bird's wing.
ex.ko: 밝은색 깃털 하나가 새의 날개에서 떨어졌다.

wn.def: surround with a wall in order to fortify

existing.en: a barrier made of wood or wire that surrounds an area

ex.en: They built a fence around the garden.

wn.def: catch or pick up (balls) in baseball or cricket
select (a team or individual player) for a game

existing.en: a piece of open land, often used for crops or animals

ex.en: Cows were grazing in the field.

existing.en: an area of ground used for playing a sport

ex.en: The players ran onto the field.

existing.en: a particular area of study or work

ex.en: She is an expert in the field of medicine.

existing.en: the number 15

ex.en: She turned fifteen last week.

existing.en: the number 50

ex.en: There were fifty people at the party.

wn.def: engaged in or ready for military or naval operations

existing.en: the act of physically struggling or battling

ex.en: Fighting broke out between the two groups.

wn.def: any material that fills a space or container

existing.en: make something full, or become full

ex.en: He filled the glass with water.

wn.def: feel or handle with the fingers
indicate the fingering for the playing of musical scores for keyboard instruments

existing.en: one of the five parts at the end of the hand

ex.en: She pointed her finger at the map.

existing.en: solid and not easily moved, pressed, or changed

ex.en: He gave her hand a firm handshake.

existing.en: a business organization, especially one providing professional services

ex.en: She works for a law firm downtown.
ex.ko: 그녀는 시내에 있는 법률 회사에서 일한다.

existing.en: become solid or tighter

ex.en: Her muscles firmed up after months of training.
ex.ko: 그녀의 근육은 몇 달간의 운동 후 단단해졌다.

wn.def: the first or highest in an ordering or series
the first element in a countable series
the time at which something is supposed to begin
the fielding position of the player on a baseball team who is stationed at first of the bases in the infield (counting counterclockwise from home plate)

existing.en: coming before all others in order or time

ex.en: This is my first visit to Korea.

existing.en: before anything or anyone else

ex.en: First, wash your hands.

existing.en: the number 5

ex.en: She has five brothers.
ex.ko: 그녀는 남자 형제가 다섯 명 있다.

wn.def: communicate or signal with a flag
droop, sink, or settle from or as if from pressure or loss of tautness

existing.en: a piece of cloth with a design that represents a country or group

ex.en: The flag waved in the wind.

wn.def: any broad thin and limber covering attached at one edge
the motion made by flapping up and down
a movable piece of tissue partly connected to the body
a movable airfoil that is part of an aircraft wing

existing.en: move up and down or from side to side, especially in the wind

ex.en: The flag flapped in the strong wind.

existing.en: a group of ships, vehicles, or aircraft owned or controlled by the same organization

ex.en: The company has a fleet of delivery trucks.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 배송 트럭 선단을 보유하고 있다.

wn.def: an acrobatic feat in which the feet roll over the head (either forward or backward) and return
hot or cold alcoholic mixed drink containing a beaten egg
the act of flipping a coin
a dive in which the diver somersaults before entering the water
(sports) the act of throwing the ball to another member of your team

existing.en: turn something over quickly with a sudden movement

ex.en: He flipped the pancake in the pan.

existing.en: turn the pages of a book or magazine quickly

ex.en: She flipped through the magazine while waiting.

existing.en: the colorful part of a plant that often has a pleasant smell

ex.en: She gave him a bunch of flowers.
ex.ko: 그녀는 그에게 꽃 한 다발을 주었다.

wn.def: move back and forth very rapidly
flap the wings rapidly or fly with flapping movements

existing.en: a quick, light movement, especially of wings or something thin

ex.en: There was a flutter of wings as the bird flew away.

existing.en: a feeling of nervous excitement

ex.en: She felt a flutter of excitement before the interview.

existing.en: the part of the leg below the ankle that you stand on

ex.en: She hurt her foot while running.

existing.en: a unit of length equal to 12 inches (about 30 cm)

ex.en: The ceiling is about ten feet high.

existing.en: the lowest part of something such as a hill or a set of stairs

ex.en: They set up camp at the foot of the mountain.

existing.en: the number 40

ex.en: My father is forty years old.

wn.def: at or near or directed toward the front
of the transmission gear causing forward movement in a motor vehicle

existing.en: toward the front or in the direction someone is facing

ex.en: She leaned forward to hear better.
ex.ko: 그녀는 더 잘 들으려고 앞으로 몸을 기울였다.

existing.en: send a message or email on to another person

ex.en: Can you forward me that email?

wn.def: become or cause to become obstructed

existing.en: an action in a sport that breaks the rules

ex.en: The referee called a foul on the player.

existing.en: having a strong, unpleasant smell or taste

ex.en: There was a foul smell coming from the trash can.

wn.def: come upon unexpectedly or after searching
food and lodging provided in addition to money

existing.en: start or create an organization, company, or institution

ex.en: The company was founded in 1995.

existing.en: the number 4

ex.en: There are four seasons in a year.

existing.en: the number 14

ex.en: She will be fourteen next month.
ex.ko: 그녀는 다음 달에 열네 살이 된다.

wn.def: a person or animal that is markedly unusual or deformed
someone who is so ardently devoted to something that it resembles an addiction

existing.en: become extremely upset, frightened, or excited

ex.en: She freaked out when she saw the spider.
ex.ko: 그녀는 거미를 보고 겁에 질려 흥분했다.

wn.def: the withdrawal of heat to change something from a liquid to a solid

existing.en: extremely cold

ex.en: It's freezing outside, so wear a coat.

wn.def: be a regular or frequent visitor to a certain place

existing.en: happening often

ex.en: There are frequent delays on this train line.
ex.ko: 이 기차 노선에는 잦은 지연이 있다.

existing.en: recently made, picked, or produced; not old

ex.en: We bought some fresh vegetables at the market.
ex.ko: 우리는 시장에서 신선한 채소를 좀 샀다.

existing.en: clean and pleasant, or new and different

ex.en: Let's go outside and get some fresh air.
ex.ko: 밖에 나가서 상쾌한 공기를 좀 마시자.

wn.def: be oriented in a certain direction, often with respect to another reference point

existing.en: the part of something that faces forward

ex.en: Let's meet in front of the station.

existing.en: located at the front of something

ex.en: Please use the front door.

wn.def: to the greatest degree or extent

existing.en: holding as much as possible; with no empty space left

ex.en: The bus was full, so we had to stand.
ex.ko: 버스가 만원이어서 우리는 서 있어야 했다.

wn.def: emit a cloud of fine particles
treat with fumes, expose to fumes, especially with the aim of disinfecting or eradicating pests
be wet with sweat or blood, as of one's face

existing.en: strong-smelling or harmful smoke or gas

ex.en: Car fumes pollute the air in big cities.

wn.def: contribute to the progress or growth of

existing.en: to a greater degree or extent

ex.en: We need to discuss this further.
ex.ko: 우리는 이것에 대해 더 논의할 필요가 있다.

existing.en: additional; more

ex.en: Please contact us for further information.
ex.ko: 추가 정보를 원하시면 저희에게 연락해 주세요.

existing.en: unnecessary excitement or worry about something small

ex.en: Don't make such a fuss over a little mistake.
ex.ko: 작은 실수 하나에 그렇게 야단법석 떨지 마.

wn.def: keep or store in a garage

existing.en: a building or part of a building where a car is kept

ex.en: He parked the car in the garage.

existing.en: a place where cars are repaired

ex.en: I took my car to the garage to get it fixed.

existing.en: an area of land, often near a house, where flowers or vegetables are grown

ex.en: She grows tomatoes in her garden.

existing.en: a fuel in the form of gas, used for cooking or heating

ex.en: We cook on a gas stove.

existing.en: a substance like air that is neither solid nor liquid

ex.en: Oxygen is a gas that we need to breathe.
ex.ko: 산소는 우리가 숨쉬는 데 필요한 기체이다.

existing.en: (American English) fuel used to make a car engine run

ex.en: We need to stop and get some gas.
ex.ko: 우리는 멈춰서 휘발유를 좀 넣어야 한다.

wn.def: breathe noisily, as when one is exhausted

existing.cue: 놀라거나 힘들어서 숨을 크게 들이쉬는 소리
existing.en: a short, quick breath taken with the mouth open, from shock or exhaustion

ex.en: She let out a gasp when she saw the surprise party.
ex.ko: 그녀는 깜짝 파티를 보고 숨을 헉 들이쉬었다.

existing.en: a long, steady look at someone or something

ex.en: He met her gaze across the room.
ex.ko: 그는 방 건너편에서 그녀의 시선과 마주쳤다.

wn.def: set the level or character of

existing.en: a part of a machine, such as a car or bicycle, that controls speed

ex.en: She shifted into a higher gear on the highway.
ex.ko: 그녀는 고속도로에서 더 높은 기어로 변속했다.

existing.en: the equipment needed for a particular activity

ex.en: Don't forget your camping gear.

existing.en: affecting or including most people or things; not specific

ex.en: The general opinion is that prices will rise.
ex.ko: 일반적인 의견은 물가가 오를 것이라는 것이다.

existing.en: a very high-ranking officer in the army

ex.en: The general led his troops into battle.
ex.ko: 그 장군은 군대를 이끌고 전투에 나섰다.

wn.def: cause to be more favorably inclined

existing.en: kind, calm, and not rough in how you treat people

ex.en: She has a very gentle personality.
ex.ko: 그녀는 매우 온화한 성격을 가지고 있다.

existing.en: not strong, steep, or sudden

ex.en: There was a gentle breeze on the beach.

wn.def: show, express or direct through movement

existing.en: a movement of the hands, arms, or body used to express meaning

ex.en: He made a gesture to show he was joking.
ex.ko: 그는 농담이라는 것을 나타내는 몸짓을 했다.

existing.en: an action that shows a particular feeling or intention

ex.en: Sending flowers was a kind gesture.
ex.ko: 꽃을 보낸 것은 친절한 마음의 표시였다.

existing.en: the spirit of a dead person that some people believe can appear

ex.en: The children told ghost stories at the campfire.
ex.ko: 아이들은 모닥불 앞에서 유령 이야기를 했다.

existing.en: something given to someone, especially on a special occasion

ex.en: Thank you for the gift.

wn.def: the elasticity of something that can be stretched and returns to its original length

existing.en: hand something to someone, or let them have it

ex.en: Can you give me a glass of water?
ex.ko: 물 한 잔 줄 수 있어?

wn.def: an assumption that is taken for granted

existing.en: already stated, decided, or agreed on

ex.en: At any given time, only ten people can enter.
ex.ko: 정해진 어느 시점이든 열 명만 들어갈 수 있다.

wn.def: look at with a fixed gaze

existing.en: a strong, unpleasant light that is difficult to look at

ex.en: The glare from the sun made it hard to see the road.
ex.ko: 햇빛의 눈부심 때문에 길이 잘 보이지 않았다.

existing.en: an angry or fierce look

ex.en: She gave him an angry glare.

wn.def: shine brightly, like a star or a light

existing.en: a small, brief flash of light or shine

ex.en: There was a gleam of excitement in her eyes.

wn.def: catch a glimpse of or see briefly

existing.en: a very brief look at something

ex.en: I only caught a glimpse of the singer.
ex.ko: 나는 그 가수를 잠깐 언뜻 봤을 뿐이다.

existing.en: great honor or fame won by an important achievement

ex.en: The team celebrated their moment of glory.

wn.def: (often used as a combining form) in a good or proper or satisfactory manner or to a high standard (`good' is a nonstandard dialectal variant for `well')
completely and absolutely (`good' is sometimes used informally for `thoroughly')

existing.en: having positive qualities; not bad

ex.en: This is a good restaurant.

existing.en: something that benefits people

ex.en: She did it for the good of the team.
ex.ko: 그녀는 팀의 이익을 위해 그렇게 했다.

wn.def: make more attractive by adding ornament, colour, etc.

existing.en: a smooth, beautiful, and elegant quality in movement or manner

ex.en: The dancer moved across the stage with grace.
ex.ko: 그 무용수는 우아하게 무대를 가로질러 움직였다.

existing.en: extra time allowed before a deadline or penalty

ex.en: The bank gave us a 30-day grace period.

wn.def: of or relating to studies beyond a bachelor's degree

existing.en: a person who has completed a course of study at a school or university

ex.en: She is a graduate of Seoul National University.

existing.en: complete a course of study and receive a degree

ex.en: He graduated from high school last year.

wn.def: represent by means of a graph

existing.en: a diagram showing how numbers or values relate to each other

ex.en: The graph shows sales over the last five years.

wn.def: spread out clothes on the grass to let it dry and bleach

existing.en: a green plant that covers the ground

ex.en: The children played on the grass.

wn.def: (biology) the process of an individual organism growing organically
(electronics) the production of (semiconductor) crystals by slow crystallization from the molten state

existing.en: becoming larger, greater, or more in amount

ex.en: There is growing concern about climate change.
ex.ko: 기후 변화에 대한 우려가 커지고 있다.

wn.def: consisting of one of two equivalent parts in value or quantity
(of siblings) related through one parent only

existing.cue: 둘로 똑같이 나눈 것 중 하나
existing.en: one of two equal parts of something

ex.en: Can I have half of your sandwich?
ex.ko: 네 샌드위치 반 나눠 줄 수 있어?

existing.en: to the extent of half

ex.en: The cup is half full.

wn.def: attempt to forecast the winner (especially in a horse race) and assign odds for or against a contestant

existing.en: something that makes it harder for someone to succeed or make progress

ex.en: Not speaking the language was a big handicap for him.
ex.ko: 그 언어를 못하는 것은 그에게 큰 불리한 조건이었다.

existing.cue: 골프 등 경기에서 실력 차 보정
existing.en: an advantage given to a weaker player to make a competition fairer

ex.en: His golf handicap is twelve.

existing.en: (somewhat old-fashioned) a physical or mental condition that limits a person's abilities

ex.en: The building was designed for people with a handicap.
ex.ko: 그 건물은 장애가 있는 사람들을 위해 설계되었다.

wn.def: put on or wear a hat

existing.en: something you wear on your head

ex.en: He wore a hat to block the sun.

wn.def: publicize widely or highly, as if with a headline
provide (a newspaper page or a story) with a headline

existing.en: the title of a newspaper article, printed in large letters

ex.en: The story made the front-page headline.

wn.def: queen of the Olympian gods in ancient Greek mythology

existing.en: in or at this place

ex.en: Come here, please.

wn.def: the dressed skin of an animal (especially a large animal)
body covering of a living animal

existing.en: go somewhere so that you cannot be seen

ex.en: The cat hid under the bed.

existing.en: put something where others cannot find it

ex.en: She hid the present in the closet.

wn.def: a lofty level or position or degree
an air mass of higher than normal pressure
a state of altered consciousness induced by alcohol or narcotics
a public secondary school usually including grades 9 through 12
a forward gear with a gear ratio that gives the greatest vehicle velocity for a given engine speed

existing.en: reaching a great distance upward

ex.en: That is a very high mountain.

existing.en: at or to a great height

ex.en: The bird flew high in the sky.

wn.def: relating to or being where one lives or where one's roots are

existing.en: the place where you live

ex.en: I stayed home all day.

existing.en: to or at the place where you live

ex.en: Let's go home now.

existing.en: moving toward or leading to home

ex.en: They began their homeward journey at sunset.
ex.ko: 그들은 해질 무렵 집으로 향하는 여정을 시작했다.

wn.def: of something having the color of honey

existing.en: a sweet, sticky substance made by bees

ex.en: She added honey to her tea.

existing.en: a word used to address someone you love

ex.en: Honey, dinner is ready.

wn.def: spend a holiday after one's marriage

existing.en: a holiday taken by a couple just after they get married

ex.en: They went to Hawaii for their honeymoon.

existing.en: a pleasant early period at the start of a relationship or new job

ex.en: The new manager's honeymoon period ended quickly.
ex.ko: 새 관리자의 허니문 기간은 빨리 끝났다.

wn.def: of or pertaining to Renaissance humanism
of or pertaining to a philosophy asserting human dignity and man's capacity for fulfillment through reason and scientific method and often rejecting religion
pertaining to or concerned with the humanities
marked by humanistic values and devotion to human welfare

existing.en: a person who believes in human reason, values, and dignity rather than religious belief

ex.en: He was a humanist who valued reason over dogma.

existing.en: the quality of being funny

ex.en: His speech was full of humor.

existing.en: the ability to understand and enjoy what is funny

ex.en: She has a great sense of humor.

wn.def: any physical damage to the body caused by violence or accident or fracture etc.
feelings of mental or physical pain
the act of damaging something or someone

existing.en: cause pain or injury to someone

ex.en: I fell and hurt my knee.

existing.en: injured or in pain

ex.en: Are you hurt?

wn.def: (`ill' is often used as a combining form) in a poor or improper or unsatisfactory manner

existing.en: not in good health; sick

ex.en: He felt too ill to go to work.
ex.ko: 그는 너무 아파서 출근할 수 없었다.

existing.en: something made to look like the real thing, but not genuine

ex.en: The bag is an imitation, not the real designer brand.
ex.ko: 그 가방은 진짜 명품이 아니라 모조품이다.

existing.en: the act of copying someone's actions, speech, or style

ex.en: Children learn language partly through imitation.
ex.ko: 아이들은 부분적으로 모방을 통해 언어를 배운다.

existing.cue: 할 수 없는, 일어날 수 없는
existing.en: not able to happen, be done, or be true

ex.en: It's impossible to finish this in one day.
ex.ko: 이것을 하루 만에 끝내는 것은 불가능하다.

wn.def: relating to or characteristic of Impressionism

existing.en: a painter who works in the style of Impressionism

ex.en: The gallery displayed works by famous Impressionists.
ex.ko: 그 미술관은 유명한 인상주의 화가들의 작품을 전시했다.

wn.def: a unit of length equal to one twelfth of a foot
a rare soft silvery metallic element
a state in midwestern United States

existing.en: inside a place, area, or period of time

ex.en: The keys are in my bag.

wn.def: falling or striking of light rays on something
(sometimes followed by `to') minor or casual or subordinate in significance or nature or occurring as a chance concomitant or consequence

existing.en: something that happens, especially something unusual or unpleasant

ex.en: The police were called to the scene of the incident.

existing.en: certain to happen and impossible to avoid

ex.en: Change is inevitable in a growing company.

wn.def: a substance formed during a chemical process before the desired product is obtained

existing.en: at a level between beginner and advanced

ex.en: She is taking an intermediate Spanish class.
ex.ko: 그녀는 중급 스페인어 수업을 듣고 있다.

existing.en: a strong, hard metal used to make steel and tools

ex.en: The gate is made of iron.

existing.en: a device used to make clothes smooth by pressing them

ex.en: Be careful, the iron is very hot.

existing.en: make clothes smooth using a heated iron

ex.en: She ironed her shirt before the interview.

wn.def: provide with a thermally non-conducting cover

existing.en: a short coat with sleeves

ex.en: He put on his jacket before going outside.
ex.ko: 그는 밖에 나가기 전에 재킷을 입었다.

wn.def: talk socially without exchanging too much information

existing.cue: 입을 이루는 얼굴의 아래 뼈 부분
existing.en: the bone structure that forms the mouth and holds the teeth

ex.en: He broke his jaw in the accident.

existing.en: the part of a tool that opens and closes to grip something

ex.en: Place the metal between the jaws of the vice.
ex.ko: 금속을 바이스의 조 사이에 끼워 넣어라.

existing.en: an airplane powered by jet engines

ex.en: The jet took off from the runway.

existing.cue: 한 곳에서 다른 곳으로 가는 여행
existing.en: the act of traveling from one place to another

ex.en: The journey to the city took five hours.
ex.ko: 그 도시까지의 여정은 다섯 시간 걸렸다.

existing.en: old or useless things that take up space

ex.en: The garage is full of junk.

wn.def: used especially of what is legally or ethically right or proper or fitting
fair to all parties as dictated by reason and conscience
free from favoritism or self-interest or bias or deception

existing.cue: 그 정도밖에 안 됨을 나타낼 때
existing.en: only, and nothing more

ex.en: It's just a small mistake.

existing.en: a very short time ago

ex.en: I just finished my homework.

existing.en: exactly or precisely

ex.en: That's just what I wanted.

wn.def: identify as in botany or biology, for example
vandalize a car by scratching the sides with a key

existing.en: a small metal object used to lock or unlock something

ex.en: I forgot my house key at home.
ex.ko: 나는 집 열쇠를 집에 두고 왔다.

existing.en: the most important thing needed for success or understanding

ex.en: Practice is the key factor in learning a language.
ex.ko: 연습이 언어 학습에서 가장 핵심적인 요소이다.

wn.def: the act of terminating a life
the destruction of an enemy plane or ship or tank or missile
the body of an animal, or bodies of animals, killed by a person or another animal

existing.en: cause a person, animal, or plant to die

ex.en: The frost killed all the flowers in the garden.

existing.en: cause someone great pain or difficulty (informal)

ex.en: My feet are killing me after the long walk.

wn.def: a basic knitting stitch made by putting the needle through the front of the stitch from the lefthand side
needlework created by interlacing yarn in a series of connected loops using straight eyeless needles or by machine

existing.en: make clothing or fabric by looping yarn together with needles

ex.en: My grandmother knitted me a scarf.

existing.en: draw your eyebrows together, especially when worried or thinking hard

ex.en: He knitted his brows in confusion.

wn.def: tie or fasten into a knot

existing.en: a fastening made by tying a piece of rope, string, or thread

ex.en: She tied a knot in the rope.

existing.en: a unit of speed used for ships and aircraft, equal to one nautical mile per hour

ex.en: The ship was sailing at 20 knots.

wn.def: the last or lowest in an ordering or series
the time at which life ends
a unit of weight equal to 4,000 pounds
a unit of capacity for grain equal to 80 bushels
the final stage or concluding parts of an event or occurrence
holding device shaped like a human foot that is used to fashion or repair shoes

existing.en: coming after all others; most recent

ex.en: This is the last chapter of the book.

existing.en: continue for a period of time

ex.en: The meeting lasted two hours.
ex.ko: 그 회의는 두 시간 동안 지속되었다.

existing.en: on the most recent occasion

ex.en: When did you last see her?

wn.def: characteristic of those who are not members of the clergy
not of or from a profession

existing.en: put something down carefully in a flat or horizontal position

ex.en: She laid the baby in the crib.

existing.en: produce an egg

ex.en: Hens lay eggs almost every day.

existing.en: a single thickness of material covering a surface or lying between other things

ex.en: The cake has three layers of chocolate.
ex.ko: 그 케이크는 세 겹의 초콜릿 층으로 되어 있다.

existing.en: a group of sports teams that compete against each other

ex.en: His team won the league this season.
ex.ko: 그의 팀은 이번 시즌 리그에서 우승했다.

existing.en: an association of countries, organizations, or people joined for a common purpose

ex.en: The League of Nations was formed after World War I.

existing.en: a talk given to teach people about a subject

ex.en: The professor gave a lecture on climate change.
ex.ko: 그 교수는 기후 변화에 대해 강의했다.

existing.en: a long talk in which someone criticizes or warns you about something

ex.en: I got a lecture from my mom about being late.
ex.ko: 나는 늦은 것에 대해 엄마한테 잔소리를 들었다.

wn.def: set down or print with letters
mark letters on or mark with letters

existing.en: a written message that you send to someone

ex.en: She wrote a letter to her grandmother.

existing.en: one of the symbols used to write a language, such as A or B

ex.en: The word 'cat' has three letters.

wn.def: a person who favors a political philosophy of progress and reform and the protection of civil liberties
a person who favors an economic theory of laissez-faire and self-regulating markets

existing.en: supporting social and political change and individual freedom

ex.en: Her parents have fairly liberal views on education.
ex.ko: 그녀의 부모님은 교육에 대해 꽤 진보적인 견해를 가지고 있다.

existing.en: given in a large or generous amount

ex.en: He added a liberal amount of butter to the pan.

wn.def: having the same or similar characteristics

existing.en: find something enjoyable or pleasant

ex.en: I like listening to music.

existing.en: similar to or in the same way as something else

ex.en: She sings like a professional.

existing.en: probable or expected to happen

ex.en: It's likely to rain this afternoon.
ex.ko: 오늘 오후에 비가 올 것 같다.

existing.en: not much; a small amount of something

ex.en: We have little time left.

existing.en: small in size

ex.en: They live in a little house by the lake.

wn.def: public transport consisting of a bus or train that stops at all stations or stops
anesthetic that numbs a particular area of the body

existing.en: relating to a particular area or neighborhood

ex.en: We shop at the local market.

wn.def: enter into a log, as on ships and planes
cut lumber, as in woods and forests

existing.en: a thick piece cut from the trunk of a tree

ex.en: They threw another log on the fire.
ex.ko: 그들은 불에 통나무를 하나 더 넣었다.

existing.en: a written record of events, especially over time

ex.en: The captain kept a log of the ship's journey.

existing.en: measuring a great distance from end to end

ex.en: She has long hair.

existing.en: for a large amount of time

ex.en: We waited long for the bus.

wn.def: turn loose or free from restraint
become loose or looser or less tight

existing.en: not firmly fixed or fitting tightly

ex.en: This shirt is too loose for me.

wn.def: people who are destined to die soon

existing.en: unable to find your way or know where you are

ex.en: We got lost in the old part of the city.
ex.ko: 우리는 도시의 옛 지역에서 길을 잃었다.

existing.en: no longer possessed, or unable to be found

ex.en: She never found her lost wallet.
ex.ko: 그녀는 잃어버린 지갑을 결국 찾지 못했다.

existing.en: the meal you eat in the middle of the day

ex.en: Let's have lunch together.

wn.def: have as one's principal field of study

existing.en: an army officer of a rank above captain

ex.en: He was promoted to major last year.

existing.en: the main subject that a student specializes in at college or university

ex.en: Her major is computer science.

existing.en: very important, serious, or significant

ex.en: Traffic is a major problem in this city.
ex.ko: 교통 체증은 이 도시의 주요한 문제이다.

wn.def: explore or survey for the purpose of making a map
locate within a specific region of a chromosome in relation to known DNA or gene sequences
plan, delineate, or arrange in detail
depict as if on a map
to establish a mapping (of mathematical elements or sets)

existing.en: a drawing that shows the features of an area, such as roads or countries

ex.en: Can you show me on the map where we are?
ex.ko: 우리가 어디 있는지 지도에서 보여줄 수 있어?

wn.def: join together into a mass or collect or form a mass

existing.en: a large amount or number of something gathered together

ex.en: A mass of clouds covered the sky.

existing.en: the amount of physical matter an object has

ex.en: The mass of the object was measured in kilograms.
ex.ko: 그 물체의 질량은 킬로그램 단위로 측정되었다.

existing.en: involving a large number of people

ex.en: The concert drew mass attention from the media.
ex.ko: 그 콘서트는 언론의 대대적인 관심을 끌었다.

wn.def: concerned with worldly rather than spiritual interests
derived from or composed of matter
directly relevant to a matter especially a law case
concerned with or affecting physical as distinct from intellectual or psychological well-being
having material or physical form or substance
having substance or capable of being treated as fact

existing.en: the substance or substances that something is made from

ex.en: This bag is made of recycled material.

existing.en: information or ideas that can be used to create or complete something

ex.en: She collected material for her research paper.
ex.ko: 그녀는 연구 논문을 위한 자료를 수집했다.

wn.def: a meeting at which a number of athletic contests are held

existing.en: come together with someone, by chance or arrangement

ex.en: Let's meet at the cafe at noon.

existing.en: satisfy a need, requirement, or condition

ex.en: The product meets all safety standards.
ex.ko: 그 제품은 모든 안전 기준을 충족한다.

existing.en: goods that are bought and sold

ex.en: The store displays its merchandise in the window.

wn.def: containing or made of or resembling or characteristic of a metal

existing.en: a hard, shiny material such as iron, gold, or steel

ex.en: The bridge is made of metal.

wn.def: stamp with a meter indicating the postage

existing.en: a metric unit of length equal to 100 centimeters

ex.en: The room is five meters wide.

existing.en: a device that measures and records the amount of something, such as gas or electricity

ex.en: He checked the electricity meter.

existing.en: having great power, strength, or force

ex.en: The mighty river carved out the canyon over millions of years.
ex.ko: 그 강력한 강은 수백만 년에 걸쳐 협곡을 깎아냈다.

existing.en: a white liquid produced by cows and other animals, used as food or drink

ex.en: She drinks a glass of milk every morning.
ex.ko: 그녀는 매일 아침 우유 한 잔을 마신다.

wn.def: (in Roman numerals, M written with a macron over it) denoting a quantity consisting of 1,000,000 items or units

existing.en: the number 1,000,000

ex.en: The city has a population of two million.

wn.def: get from the earth by excavation

existing.en: a place where minerals such as coal or gold are dug from the ground

ex.en: His grandfather worked in a coal mine.

wn.def: attend to the wants and needs of others

existing.en: a senior member of a government in charge of a particular department

ex.en: The Minister of Education announced new school policies.
ex.ko: 교육부 장관이 새로운 학교 정책을 발표했다.

existing.en: a person authorized to lead religious services, especially in a Christian church

ex.en: The minister gave a moving sermon.

wn.def: characterized by painstaking care and detailed examination

existing.en: a unit of time equal to 60 seconds

ex.en: Wait a minute, please.

wn.def: a person who takes a position in the political center

existing.en: average in amount, quality, or degree; not extreme

ex.en: He does a moderate amount of exercise every day.
ex.ko: 그는 매일 적당한 양의 운동을 한다.

existing.en: (of opinions or policies) not extreme, especially in politics

ex.en: She has moderate political views.
ex.ko: 그녀는 온건한 정치적 견해를 가지고 있다.

existing.en: lead a discussion or debate and make sure it stays fair and organized

ex.en: She will moderate tonight's debate.
ex.ko: 그녀는 오늘 밤 토론의 사회를 볼 것이다.

wn.def: a typeface (based on an 18th century design by Gianbattista Bodoni) distinguished by regular shape and hairline serifs and heavy downstrokes

existing.en: belonging to the present time or a recent time, rather than the past

ex.en: They live in a modern apartment.

wn.def: (comparative of `much' used with mass nouns) a quantifier meaning greater in size or amount or extent or degree
(comparative of `many' used with count nouns) quantifier meaning greater in number

existing.en: a greater amount or degree of something

ex.en: Can I have more coffee, please?
ex.ko: 커피 좀 더 마실 수 있을까요?

existing.en: certain to die at some point, as all living things are

ex.en: All humans are mortal.

existing.en: causing or able to cause death

ex.en: He suffered a mortal wound in the battle.

existing.en: a mixture of cement, sand, and water used to hold bricks or stones together

ex.en: The bricklayer spread mortar between the bricks.

existing.en: a short cannon that fires shells high into the air over a short distance

ex.en: The soldiers fired mortars at the enemy position.
